stemHtml:
During dispatch calculations, you want to calculate the maximum possible traffic load and carry as minimum 13 800 kg of block fuel.

Determine the allowed traffic load for your flight, given:

Allowed take-off mass: 71 402 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 56 850 kg
Dry operating mass: 40 763 kg
Actual Traffic load: 14 894 kg
Taxi Fuel: 179 kg
Assume NO restrictions on the landing Mass
